hero.title: Need Help with Notarization or Legal Documents?
hero.summary: For 20 years, we have helped our clients with notarization signings, translations, and document issuance in Israel and worldwide — including apostille, police certificate of integrity, FBI certification, legal opinions on foreign law, and document retrieval in Israel, Germany, Austria, and more.

notarial.title: Notarial Services
notarial.description: Signature verification, notarized copies, affidavits, declarations, and other official notarial services.

police.description: Assistance obtaining police records, certificate of integrity, and other official certificates from relevant authorities.

apostilles.title: Apostilles
apostilles.description: Support with apostille certification for documents intended for use abroad.

foreignLaw.description: Legal opinions for courts and official institutions regarding foreign laws.

archive.description: Search and retrieval of documents from archives in Israel, Germany, and Austria.

epa.title: Enduring Power of Attorney (EPA)
epa.description: Preparation and notarization of enduring power of attorney documents for ongoing legal representation.

notarizedPoA.description: Notarized power of attorney documents for personal, legal, and administrative matters in Israel and abroad.

idfCertificates.title: IDF Service Certificates

loenelywolf.text:
I have recently used this law firm for 1) apostille and translation service relating to a death certificate and 2) a simple notary service on an entirely different matter. I had no prior experience with this law firm other than seeing the occasional commercials on YouTube (not applicable to my situation) and recommendation by Google Search.

Was Decker, Pex & Co the first law firm that I called? No, they were actually the second, BUT it took less than 5 minutes for me to decide to go with them. When I contacted the law firm via a WhatsApp text message, Netali, the paralegal from the Jerusalem branch, texted back with the swiftness, professionalism, and, most importantly to a foreigner, an English proficiency that was impressive, reassuring, and welcoming.

The law firm was very transparent with their pricings and, when appropriate, offered alternative solutions to minimize costs while achieving similar results. Netali was very patient, detailed in her explanations, and took great care to help me understand the process and manage my expectations. There was never a moment where I felt I was being pressured to sign with her law firm.

All in all, both their advice and service are reliable and consistent from initial consultation to execution to conclusion. Netali kept me informed throughout the process, and this meant a lot to me.

adi-katina.text:
Great Team. With no doubt, this office is actually thee best-leading office in Israel. Simply put, if you want your case to win, just join them, hand in your documents, and celebrate the victory.

Kindest regards,
Adi k.

shurouq-hajyassin.text:
We were very satisfied with the consultation we had.
You were very straightforward with us , You tried to help us in every way you could . we really appreciate that.
And of course the fast reply we got from you on our emails and the appointment you gave us .
You deserve more than 5 stars🤩
